# IT Rapid Support

> Managed IT services, cybersecurity, and 24/7 IT support for businesses across the Greater Toronto Area. Headquartered in Vaughan, Ontario, serving Toronto, Mississauga, Brampton, Markham, Oakville, and the wider GTA.

## About
- Company: IT Rapid Support Inc.
- Headquarters: 7810 Keele St, Vaughan, ON, Canada
- Phone: (289) 582-9930
- Focus: managed IT services, managed cybersecurity, cloud security, and 24/7 helpdesk/IT support for small and mid-sized businesses in Ontario.

## Services
- [Managed Security Services](https://itrapidsupport.com/managed-security)
- [Threat Detection & Response](https://itrapidsupport.com/threat-detection)
- [Cloud Security](https://itrapidsupport.com/cloud-security)
- [24/7 IT Support](https://itrapidsupport.com/it-support)
- [High Net Worth Security](https://itrapidsupport.com/high-net-worth-security)
- [Security Assessment](https://itrapidsupport.com/security-assessment)

## Service Areas
- [IT Support Toronto](https://itrapidsupport.com/it-support/toronto)
- [IT Support Vaughan](https://itrapidsupport.com/it-support/vaughan)
- [IT Support Mississauga](https://itrapidsupport.com/it-support/mississauga)
- [IT Support Brampton](https://itrapidsupport.com/it-support/brampton)
- [IT Support Markham](https://itrapidsupport.com/it-support/markham)
- [IT Support Oakville](https://itrapidsupport.com/it-support/oakville)
- Full GTA coverage including Richmond Hill, Burlington, North York, Hamilton, Milton, Etobicoke, Scarborough, Newmarket, Aurora, Pickering, Ajax, Whitby, Oshawa, King City, Caledon, and Georgetown.
